arts.ttl: “We must overcome our limits”: Kosta Runjaic prepares Udinese for Fiorentina challenge
arts.sum: Udinese manager Kosta Runjaic shared his thoughts ahead of the team's upcoming match against Fiorentina, emphasizing the need for improvement and overcoming limitations. He acknowledged the quality of Fiorentina, particularly praising their attacking prowess and high-pressing style. Runjaic noted that Fiorentina's current league position is well-deserved, setting the stage for a difficult encounter.
